description: '''Pagan rock''' is a genre of rock music created by neopagans and which contains themes of [[neopagan]] beliefs and traditions. It can also be used to describe bands which are not strictly pagan but are favoured by modern pagans. It developed as a distinct genre in 1980s, and often overlaps with or contains elements of [[gothic rock]] and [[folk music]]. Pagan rock music involves themes such as spirituality, nature, and folklore.
